Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{3: 'The first thing you feel is a bone-chilling cold.'}
{3: 'Then comes the howling wind, and the constant patter of tiny hard particles hitting your gear.'}
{3: 'Your consciousness claws its way back from a blank void.'}
{3: 'The cold is so sharp it feels like it could freeze your thoughts. It needles through your combat suit into your skin.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Ui/Prefab/UiEffect/UiMovie/FxUiMovieBgBlizzard.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1107.jpg'}
{3: 'After the rift swallows you, your vision cuts out for a moment. When it returns, it\'s nothing but wind and snow.'}
{3: 'A low, lead-gray sky blends into the gray-white ground. The horizon is almost impossible to see.'}
{3: 'Snow reaches past your calves. Only black rock breaks the surface now and then, sketching the ridge line.'}
{3: 'An unfamiliar mountain range. And it feels completely real.'}
{2: '(What is this place...?)', 3: '21'}
{3: 'Judging from the surroundings, the altitude here is high.'}
{2: '(Gotta get out of here before hypothermia hits.)', 3: '24'}
{2: '(Find Alpha after the blizzard passes.)', 3: '25'}
{3: 'You grit your teeth and start pushing downhill, stumbling through the deep snow.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1092.jpg'}
{3: 'In the endless blizzard, time stops making sense.'}
{2: '(...How long have I been walking?)', 3: '32'}
{3: 'One hour? Two hours?'}
{3: 'Breathing gets harder. Your chest feels crushed. Every breath takes everything you\'ve got.'}
{3: 'You suddenly find yourself on a high-altitude snowy mountain, and the symptoms of altitude sickness start to hit you.'}
{3: 'If not for your tactical goggles, you\'d already be snow-blind.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest01.prefab'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest01.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest02.prefab'}
{3: 'Your head pounds. Nausea rolls in waves. Heat bleeds out of you. Your limbs go numb and stiff.'}
{3: 'Your movements are slow. A strange burning spreads through your limbs. It\'s the first warning sign before hypothermia strikes.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Through the gray-white snow, you spot a faint silhouette in the distance.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest02.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest03.prefab'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest03.prefab'}
{1: '1', 3: 'It cuts through the storm at frightening speed. A single streak of red in a world of gray.'}
{3: 'You try to answer, but only a weak breath escapes.'}
{3: 'Alpha checks you fast, then crouches. She hooks your arms over her shoulders and steadily lifts you onto her back.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'You\'re freezing... Stay with me.', 4: '1', 18: '100017037'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'She accelerates. Even carrying you, she moves steady over deep snow and steep slopes like it\'s flat ground.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1107.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{3: 'She races toward the base of the mountain, her gaze cutting through the blizzard until she spots the outline of a snow-covered cabin tucked against a row of jutting rocks halfway up the slope.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1107.jpg', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'She immediately changes course, sprinting toward the cabin.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Ui/Prefab/UiEffect/UiMovie/FxUiMovieBgBlizzard.prefab'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryLineSpreadNew.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory263.png'}
{1: '"Throne"'}
{2: '"Throne"'}
{3: '"Shadow" sits on her throne.'}
{3: 'It isn\'t inside any palace. It\'s set in a ruined square. If you were here, you\'d recognize it instantly. This is Babylonia.'}
{3: 'But the square is nothing but shattered walls and broken stone. Dark red liquid coats the ground. You can\'t tell if it\'s blood, vital fluid, or both.'}
{3: 'A deep slash runs from her left shoulder down to her chest.'}
{3: '"Shadow" lowers her head and brushes her fingers over the wound. The pain spikes.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziEndWhite.prefab', 2: '2', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A thin white mist appears in the air and flows into her body, slowly knitting the injury closed.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiDuihualiziEndWhite.prefab', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'To leave a wound like this...', 4: '1', 18: '100017039'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront39.png', 4: '4'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1495.jpg'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMovieFilm.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Shadow recalls Alpha\'s figure in battle.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMovieFilm.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront39.png', 4: '4', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory263.png'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'Besides the Ascension Network, what else does she have... that I don\'t...?', 4: '1', 18: '100017077'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'Is there another way besides the Ascension Network...?', 4: '1', 18: '100017078'}
{3: 'She lowers her head, and painful memories begin resurfacing before her eyes. Along with the scars on her body, everything is acting to remind her of everything she has lost.'}
{3: 'The things that she has lost, and the things that she has destroyed...'}
{3: 'At this point, there is simply no way she can accept the possibility of another path.'}
{3: 'She raises a hand. Her voice stays quiet, but the pressure behind it spreads through the square.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Click. Click.'}
{3: 'Between the rubble, gears turn. A hazy, grotesque shape comes into view.'}
{1: '1', 3: '"Shadow" looks at it like it\'s filth, irritation flashing across her face.'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'Find me Alpha... And that commandant.', 4: '1', 18: '100017041'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'They crossed the rift. They\'re here. Track them down, and kill the human.', 4: '1', 18: '100017042'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Her lips curl into a cruel smile.'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'Bring her to me. I\'m ending her myself.', 4: '1', 18: '100017044'}
{3: 'The creature stretches its neck and presses its face to the ground in an exaggerated bow.'}
{3: 'It keeps bowing as it backs away, retreating until it\'s far off, then slips into a crack in the rubble and disappears.'}
{3: 'Silence returns to the throne.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory754.jpg'}
{1: 'Alpha slams her shoulder into the frozen cabin door, carries you inside on her back, then shuts it tight behind her.', 5: '3'}
{1: 'The cabin is sturdier than it looks. Old, but solid enough to block the wind, snow, and biting cold outside.', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Inside is small and rough. A stone fireplace. A wooden bed covered in pelts. One table, two chairs, and a few crates and jars.', 5: '1'}
{1: 'She lays you on the bed, then turns to clear out the fireplace.', 5: '1', 6: '1'}
{1: 'Soon, orange-red flames spring to life. The dancing light spreads warmth through the room.', 5: '3'}
{1: 'She rummages through a crate, pulls out thick treated hides, and wraps you up.', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Then she checks the jars: dried meat, black bread, a small bag of coarse salt, and a tin of tea leaves.', 5: '1'}
{1: 'She fills an iron kettle with clean snow and sets it over the fire.', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Then she tears the dried meat apart, drops it into a pot with the hard bread, sprinkles in salt, and lets it simmer.', 5: '1'}
{1: 'When she\'s done, she looks back at you.', 5: '1', 7: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Stay awake. We\'re not safe yet. You need to eat.', 4: '1', 18: '100017046'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest01.prefab'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest01.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest02.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew01.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'The smell of food mixes with burning wood and fills the cabin. With the heat on your skin, sleep starts pulling you under.'}
{3: 'Just as you start to drift off, a sharp sting hits your cheek.'}
{1: 'AniZhuanchangEnd'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew01.prefab'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest02.prefab'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest03.prefab'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUiFight/FxUiMohuTest03.prefab'}
{3: 'The jolt snaps you awake. Alpha just pinched your cheek.'}
{3: 'She pours the tea into a cup and hands it to you.'}
{3: 'Ignoring your denial, she pours the tea into a cup and hands it to you.'}
{3: 'You try to sit up and reach for it, but your arms are still weak. Your fingers tremble.'}
{3: 'You lean forward and cradle the aluminum cup in both hands.'}
{3: 'The shaking makes some tea spill onto the back of your hand. You barely feel it.'}
{3: 'The warmth goes down. A little color returns to your face.'}
{3: 'Only now does it really hit you. You made it. You\'re alive.'}
{2: 'Alpha, about that person earlier...', 3: '217'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'She calls herself Shadow.', 4: '1', 18: '100017048'}
{3: 'Alpha pauses after saying the name.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I saw an illusion not long ago. It showed me another...', 4: '1', 18: '100017049'}
{3: 'She glances at you.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Another possibility.', 4: '1', 18: '100017050'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'In it, Babylonia sent a massive force of Constructs to hunt me down. Not me, exactly. Another me.', 4: '1', 18: '100017051'}
{2: 'Another you? You mean Shadow?', 3: '227'}
{2: 'Could this be... connected to the Ascension-Network?', 3: '229'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I don\'t think it\'s the network.', 4: '1', 18: '100017053'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'During the fight, parts of her body turned into mist.', 4: '1', 18: '100017054'}
{2: '...The Mist?'}
{3: 'Hearing Alpha\'s words, you remember the mist pouring out when "Shadow" appeared.'}
{3: 'She also remembers... the other life she experienced within the Mist.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'You look toward Alpha, and it\'s clear that she understands exactly what you\'re thinking.'}
{2: 'But it didn\'t feel like the Mist we\'ve seen before.', 3: '240'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I don\'t know where we are, or what she\'s planning. But from what she said, this is about me.', 4: '1', 18: '100017056'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I have a theory. It might be related to the mist passages we opened before.', 4: '1', 18: '100017058'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: '"Shadow" might just be an illusion born from that mist.', 4: '1', 18: '100017059'}
{2: 'Then what\'s creating these illusions?', 3: '247'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'No idea. We know too little about the mist.', 4: '1', 18: '100017060'}
{2: 'So this mountain... could be part of it too?', 3: '249'}
{2: 'It all feels real. Too real...', 3: '252'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Either way, if she wants my body, let her come take it.', 4: '1', 18: '100017062'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'If she summoned me here with an illusion, she\'d better be ready to die for it.', 4: '1', 18: '100017063'}
{3: 'As she says this, Alpha shows a confident smile.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'But... this is between me and her. I don\'t want you getting dragged into it. I don\'t know what\'s ahead.', 4: '1', 18: '100017064'}
{2: 'My job was to check the F.O.S. ruins for anything abnormal.', 3: '260'}
{2: 'And clearly, we\'ve found our anomaly.', 3: '261'}
{2: 'If Shadow can affect reality, then she has a way out of here. A way back to reality.', 3: '262'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: '...Fine. Then we work together.', 4: '1', 18: '100017065'}
{3: 'As your conversation ends, the stew finishes simmering.'}
{3: 'Alpha ladles out a bowl and hands it to you.'}
{3: 'You shift on the bed and take it with an unsteady grip.'}
{3: 'You try to lift a spoonful, but your trembling hand spills it.'}
{2: '(Glance over at Alpha)', 3: '274', 4: '(Struggle to steady your hand)', 5: '291'}
{1: '1', 3: 'You tilt your head, watching Alpha from the side.'}
{3: 'Alpha stares out the window, watching you from the corner of her eye. Her fingers tap lightly on the table.'}
{3: 'She sighs like she\'s had enough, stands up, and takes the bowl from you.'}
{3: 'You nod. No arguing.'}
{3: 'She scoops up a spoonful, pauses, blows on it, then brings it to your lips.'}
{3: 'It isn\'t gentle, but it\'s steady. No spills. No burns.'}
{3: 'She answers quietly, almost a mumble. There\'s the faintest hint of amusement in it.'}
{3: 'You take a deep breath and force your hand to steady. You scoop up another spoonful and bring it to your mouth.'}
{3: 'Every spoonful spills a little back into the bowl, but you keep trying. Again and again, you swallow the broth bit by bit.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha stares out the window, watching you from the corner of her eye. Her fingers tap lightly on the table.'}
{3: 'After a moment, she sighs, stands, and walks over. She snatches the metal bowl out of your hands.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'You can\'t even hold a bowl... You look ridiculous.', 4: '1', 18: '100017069'}
{2: 'I can do it myself.', 3: '301'}
{3: 'Alpha raises an eyebrow but doesn\'t argue. She sits down in front of you and hands the bowl back.'}
{3: 'You take it and keep eating, slow and careful.'}
{3: 'Alpha watches with her arms crossed. Only when you finish does she take the empty bowl.'}
{3: 'There\'s a barely perceptible trace of amusement in her voice.'}
{3: 'After the fire is fed twice, the howling wind outside fades, then finally stops.'}
{3: 'The dishes are cleaned up. With rest, you start to get your strength back.'}
{3: 'In a wooden crate, you two find thick fur coats and hats.'}
{3: 'You put them on and push open the cabin door. The storm is over.'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0'}
{3: 'Then you both go quiet. The sky outside is... wrong.'}
{3: 'It\'s not a real sky. It looks like different canvases stitched together, rough and mismatched.'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1004', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront25.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1118.jpg'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1004', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront26.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1389.jpg'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png', 3: '1', 4: '0', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1004', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront111.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory550.jpg'}
{3: 'One part is clear blue with a few white clouds. Right beside it burns a vivid orange sunset. Another patch is deep black, with a few blurred stars.'}
{3: 'And at the edge of the horizon, an enormous structure stands tilted against the earth.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1092.jpg'}
{3: 'It stands there in silence, pressing down on you with sheer presence.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'It\'s been completely rebuilt.', 4: '1', 18: '100017072'}
{2: 'Is that where "Shadow" is?', 3: '347'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I can feel her... She\'s there, calling me.', 4: '1', 18: '100017073'}
{1: '1005', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory105.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory105.png'}
{3: 'You pull your eyes away and look down the mountain. Below the snowline, near a sparse treeline, thin trails of smoke rise above low rooftops. It looks like a small village.'}
{2: 'Let\'s head to the village. We need information first.', 3: '354'}
{3: 'The two of you start down toward it.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory216.png'}
{3: 'Near the outskirts, it\'s unnaturally quiet. Broken wooden fences lean at odd angles. The cabins that still look intact have their windows shut tight.'}
{3: 'Just as you\'re about to step into the village...'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiMovie/FxUiMoviejianshi.prefab', 2: '3'}
{3: 'Whoosh.'}
{3: 'A sharp whistle cuts the air. A crossbow bolt slams into the snow right in front of you.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory215.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory215.png'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Then, on the roof of a taller cabin nearby, someone stands up.'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Stop. Who are you, and what are you doing here?', 4: '1', 18: '100017074'}
{3: 'He\'s dressed like a hunter, holding a reloaded crossbow. Even so, it\'s clear he\'s a Construct.'}
{2: 'We\'re not looking for trouble...', 3: '374'}
{3: 'Before you can finish, Alpha speaks, surprised.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The man on the roof flinches at the name.'}
{3: 'You search your memory. Hiro...'}
{2: 'Hiro from the original Gray Raven squad?', 3: '383'}
